Competency probe: Combine application checks with proxy rules, firewall egress, metadata denial, network namespace, and production observation.

For Authorized site auditing and Go Defend the Egress Defense Depth model · Theory Egress Defense Depth, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Correct Go code alone can guarantee every network route.
